Speed Distance Time Calculator

Calculate speed, distance, or time when you know two of the three values. Uses the formula: Distance = Speed × Time.

FAQ

What is the speed distance time formula?

Speed = Distance ÷ Time, Distance = Speed × Time, Time = Distance ÷ Speed.

How do I convert between speed units?

1 mph = 1.609 km/h = 0.447 m/s. 1 km/h = 0.621 mph = 0.278 m/s.

What is average speed?

Average speed = Total distance traveled ÷ Total time taken, regardless of speed variations during the trip.
